events.title: Cayucos Friday Farmers Market
events.window: Every Friday, 10am to 12:30pm, Memorial Day weekend through Labor Day weekend
events.venue: Corner of D Street & Ocean Ave (Vet's Hall parking lot), Cayucos
events.summary: Seasonal open-air market with local produce, plants, flowers, baked goods & more every Friday morning through summer.

events.title: Brian Waterbury Memorial Rock to Pier Fun Run & Half Marathon
events.venue: Starts at Morro Rock, finishes at Cayucos Pier
events.summary: 56th annual beach run on hard-packed sand: 6-mile Rock to Pier (finishes Cayucos Pier) + half marathon out-and-back. All ages welcome.

events.title: Cayucos Antique Street Faire (Fall)
events.venue: Downtown Cayucos, N. Ocean Ave (Cayucos Drive to E Street)
events.summary: 100+ vendors selling antiques, vintage goods & collectibles along downtown Cayucos. Food court and activity station on-site.

events.title: 35th Annual Cayucos Car Show
events.summary: Classic cars fill downtown Cayucos with a live band, beer garden & Lions BBQ. Friday evening check-in party at Nelson's Garage.
